prestazioni: Engine Code: **NE1.5T** (1.5L Turbocharged Inline-4, 400Nm stock) – Forced induction upgrade via **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** (set to 28psi peak boost) and **PTP Turbo Blankets** for thermal management. Requires **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 CR) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** with **ARP 2000 rod bolts** to handle 500whp reliably.

Fuel System: **Bosch Motorsport 0261500367 1000cc high-impedance injectors** (side-feed, ethanol-compatible) fed by a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump** (with **Radium Engineering surge tank** for cornering stability) and **AEM 340026 fuel pressure regulator**. ECU reflash via **ECU Master EMU Black** (standalone, CAN bus integration for hybrid powertrain) with custom **E85 flex-fuel mapping** and **anti-lag launch control** (0-60mph in 3.2s).

Drivetrain & Cooling: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.5-way, 45% lock under power) in a **PPG close-ratio 6-speed manual transmission** (custom gearset: 2.97/1.95/1.34/1.00/0.85/0.72) with **South Bend Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** (ceramic puck, 800Nm capacity). **PWR Australia 4-core front-mount intercooler** (1200cfm airflow) with **Mishimoto silicone hoses** and **C&R Racing aluminum radiator** (dual 16" SPAL fans). **AEM CD-7 dash** with **Motec C127 data logger** for real-time monitoring.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-S7 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated 3-piece overfenders, 50mm wider front/60mm rear, carbon fiber front splitter with **Vortex Generators**), paired with **Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser** (dual 4" exhaust exits, **Akrapovič Ti-Evo** titanium exhaust system). **Seibon Carbon hood** (vented, 1.5kg weight reduction) and **RE Amemiya GT-II rear wing** (3D-printed aluminum mounts, 1200mm span, adjustable angle up to 20°).

**Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +35 / 19x12 +40 wheels** (ET custom-machined for S7 hubs, **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** 275/30/19 and 315/30/19 tires) with **BC Racing BR coilovers** (12kg/mm front/14kg/mm rear springs, **Swift Spec-R springs** for linear response). **AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers** (355mm rotors, **Ferodo DS2500 pads**) with **Goodridge 7AN stainless steel brake lines**.

**Custom livery by FTSpeed (Japan)**: Matte **PPG Xtreme Basecoat** (Color Code: **Deepal Racing Blue #B3E5FC**) with **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl** roof and mirror caps. **Anzo USA LED headlights** (HID projector retrofit, **Morimoto XB35 bulbs**) and **Lux H8 V4 angel eyes**. **Recaro Pole Position seats** (Schroth 6-point harnesses, **Sparco carbon fiber seat mounts**) with **Takata Drift II steering wheel** (13.5" suede, **NRG quick-release hub**).
